top_signals.title: NATO chief says alliance ‘ready to defend every inch of Allied territory’ after Russian drone hits member state Romania
top_signals.summary: Romania’s president said the collision demands a “firm, coordinated, and appropriate response."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Iran war is providing an unexpected boost to secondary city travel in Asia-Pacific
top_signals.summary: Trips to smaller "secondary cities" in Asia-Pacific are getting an added boost this summer, as the Iran war is spurring travelers to plan trips closer to home.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Said to Cut IPO Valuation Goal
top_signals.summary: SpaceX is currently targeting a valuation of at least $1.8 trillion in its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter. Bloomberg News reported in April that SpaceX was aiming for a valuation above $2 trillion. The target is settling lower after consultations with advisers and investors, the people said, asking not to be identified as the information isn’t public. Matthew Bloxham of Bloomberg Intelligence has more. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan voices concern over rice imports in white paper
top_signals.summary: Private-sector rice imports experienced a sharp increase after retail prices roughly doubled year on year in May 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
